extract: Gallade (Japanese: エルレイド Erureido) is a dual-type Psychic/Fighting Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from a male Kirlia when exposed to a Dawn Stone. It is one of Ralts's final forms, the other being Gardevoir. Gallade can Mega Evolve into Mega Gallade using the Galladite. Mega Gallade was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. The Paradox Pokémon Iron Valiant is said to be a future relative of Gallade and Gardevoir or a version of them from a parallel timeline.
